channel.title: JCStream changes
channel.description: New, updated, and released records on the Hamilton County, OH Justice Center public roster.

item.title: booked · SPICER BERNICE
item.description: SPICER BERNICE (#2095995) was booked 1/1/70 into the Hamilton County Justice Center.
